name: Full Internal Audit
description: Comprehensive internal audit covering all ISO 13485 clauses 4-8.

name: Design Controls Audit
description: Focused audit of design and development controls (clause 7.3).

name: Supplier Audit
description: Supplier / purchasing controls audit (clause 7.4) plus document and record control.

name: CAPA and Improvement Audit
description: Audit of measurement, analysis and improvement including CAPA (clause 8).

name: AI/ML Validation Audit
description: Audit of AI/ML-based device software: design controls, process validation, risk management and post-market monitoring.
